category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a bytecode optimizer for Android apps; official Redex site calls it an Android bytecode optimizer.
display_name_sources: Official Redex homepage uses Redex as the product name; source_facts.name is redex.
docs_sources: Official fbredex.com documentation has getting started and usage sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/facebook/redex; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Android bytecode optimization; official Redex docs cover APK optimization usage.
